items.d: Expertise in strategic analysis and professional strategy solving for industrial management bottlenecks and growth hurdles.
Conceptualized and secured funding (SSIP) for a hardware startup focused on sustainable innovation in the laundry sector.
Shortlisted for the national enterprise journey to build India through social entrepreneurship and enterprise networking.
Successfully cleared the UPSC written examination and qualified for the SSB interview for officer selection.
Developed a functional industrial vending machine integrating complex embedded systems and automated logic.
